name: Marty's 5 Cup Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure coconut in a carton-full and set aside.
2. Drain mandarin oranges into a small can and reserve the juice.
3. Drain crushed pineapple into a small can and reserve the juice.
4. Add the drained coconut to the bowl containing the sour cream.
5. Add the mini marshmallows to the bowl.
6. Pour in the reserved juices from the mandarin oranges and crushed pineapple.
7. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
8. Cover the bowl and place it in the refrigerator overnight.
9. Serve the salad the next day.
This is a good make-ahead dish, perfect for when you have company.
